programmes.show_description: 60 minutes of hits & headlines from the year we said hello to Dawn French's 'The Vicar of Dibley' and goodbye to Esther Rantzen's 'That's Life'.
60 minutes of hits & headlines from the year Brit Pop peaked, but so did Robson & Jerome! And toy of the year were Pogs - and they were banned from classrooms & school playgrounds!
60 minutes of hits & headlines from the year Tom Holland & Lewis Capaldi were born, and when The Spice Girls conquered the world!
Songs in 1997 that you may have forgotten from artists you'll certainly know!
Songs from the 00s that you really like, but are a bit too embarrassed to admit? If that's the case then Pat Sharp urges you to have a little less shame in your musical game!
Songs you may have forgotten from artists you'll certainly know!
What was in the top 5 every Easter holiday in the 2000s? We choose 3 mega-hits from each year, 2000 to 2009, with Rihanna, Usher, McFly, Avril, Gareth, Will, and loads more!
Dust off your flip phones and get ready to dance the day away with the ultimate collection of hits that'll transport you back to those unforgettable millenium parties!
"Dance dominated the UK charts in the 00s and there were many number 1s. So we asked former Kiss FM DJ Robin Banks to pick his favourite 40 chart toppers of the whole decade!
Turn it up loud! As we return to the biggest bangers & classic floorfillers that make every 90s & 00s party epic!
Starting back in 2009 with Love Story, here are Taylor's greatest tracks!
Get the tissues ready for 20 box office ballads! Starting in the 90's with a classic from the blockbuster Ghost through to Take That's epic Stardust anthem in the 00s!
Kick back and relax with some mellow moments. Chilled to perfection.
Starting in 1990, two hours of powerhouse ballads, legendary love songs & pure emotion that can only be delivered by a musical queen. This is the incredible Mariah Carey!
Kick back and relax with some mellow moments. Chilled to perfection.
60 minutes of hits & headlines from the year of NOW 38, Brass Eye, Pokemon & The Full Monty!
60 minutes of hits & headlines from the year JK Rowling released the 2nd Harry Potter book, All Saints won Best Single at the BRITS, and we started building the Millennium Dome!
60 minutes of hits & headlines from the year of movies The Matrix & Notting Hill, plus the TV debuts of Grand Designs & Bob The Builder.
The standout chart music that defined the decade - from indie rock, singer-songwriters & girl bands to dance, R&B and the early emergence of UK garage & grime.

programmes.show_name: It Spent HOW Long At No.1 ?!
programmes.show_description: Once these tracks made it to the top spot there was no knocking them off! The 50 longest chart toppers of the 00s - every song spent at least 3 weeks at the summit.
Every track a smash hit, every video a UK chart number one in the 00s. What more could you possibly need in life!
60 minutes of acts that had a single smash hit number 1, then never darkened the top 20 ever again! From Maria McKee in 1990 to Baz Luhrmann at the end of the decade.
Radio 1 legend Bruno Brookes returns with a countdown of the 40 biggest singles of the decade. Including 37 UK number 1s & big million-selling hits from Britney, Cher & Elton John.
There's nothing quite like a cheesy good party... Unless its a 90s cheesy party that is!! These are the greatest party anthems from the 90s. Fact!
70 feelgood faves & raves from the decade of dance, britpop, Cool Brittania & Kylie Minogue!
A little bit of love in the 90s from the likes of Take That, George Michael, Boyzone, Whitney Houston, Celine Dion and a load more.
Ladies in love and heartbroken heroines. These are the greatest stars of the decade, all pouring their hearts out for your attention.
